channel.title: Posts on Mattia Mondin
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Mattia Mondin

item.title: Defining CUJ SLOs: A Process Framework
item.description: An end-to-end framework for defining Critical User Journey SLOs, from business strategy to operational review.

item.title: Observability Prerequisites for SLO Implementation
item.description: A structured approach to resolving the instrumentation-before-measurement dependency when rolling out SLOs.

item.title: CUJ SLO Implementation: Workflows and Job Execution
item.description: How to identify minimal CUJ endpoints and map service dependencies for workflow and job execution user journeys, with practical decisions from implementation.

item.title: CUJ SLO Implementation Assessment
item.description: An honest assessment of implementing CUJ SLOs at scale: what was delivered, what constrained delivery, and recommendations for the long term.

item.title: CUJ SLOs vs Service SLOs
item.description: The conceptual distinction between black-box CUJ SLOs and white-box service health SLOs, and how service dependency types determine what to measure.

item.title: SRE Best Practices for Service Level Objectives
item.description: Curated SRE best practices on error budgets, SLOs, and reliability culture, drawn from Google SRE principles.
